interaction_type_site: Direct pairing leading to mRNA decay
notes: This short sequence within the fis 5' UTR is the core base-pairing site for SraL. SraL uses its conserved 3' end (containing CUAAGGCAGC) to base-pair with the fis mRNA, promoting its degradation.

mrna_name: sodB (Iron-containing superoxide dismutase B;iron regulation gene)
interaction_type_site: Coding region pairing, RNase E-mediated decay
notes: This region includes the sodB RBS and the initial coding sequence where RyhB binds.  RyhB base-pairs with a sequence spanning the sodB RBS and early coding region, recruiting Hfq and RNase E to degrade the mRNA and repress translation.
